title: matthiola revoluta var. bungeana
intro: Matthiola revoluta var. bungeana, also known as the 'Rock Stock', is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and compact growth habit. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Matthiola revoluta var. bungeana include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
